sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 45:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 45:1
items.html: When two spiritual entities become completely equal in their form, without any disparity, they become literally one. In that state, the small one becomes annulled in the great one.
